==Vienna Game, Zhuravlev Countergambit==
This move attempts to attack the powerful c3 knight, and if the d pawn moves, the knight will be pinned. More often, this move is played a bit later, but this variation is still playable.

[[/3. d4/]] is playable, but not considered the best, other moves like [[/3. Bc4/]] and [[/3. Nd5/]] are considered better

{{ChessMid}}
